name: @hypaware/claude
description: Anthropic Claude Code client adapter for HypAware. Registers the Anthropic upstream preset on the local AI gateway, configures Claude Code's settings.json to route through the gateway, enriches ai_gateway_messages with transcript-derived columns, and ships helper skills.

init_presets.name: claude-and-otel-local
init_presets.summary: Capture Claude Code + OTLP locally, export to Parquet under HYP_HOME/exports
